[=] Access Hitag S in Plain mode

[=] --- Tag Information ---------------------------
[=]  Memory type...... Hitag S 256
[=]  Authenticaion.... No
[=]  TTF coding....... Manchester
[=]  TTF data rate.... 2 kBit
[=]  TTF mode......... Page 4, Page 5, Page 6, Page 7
[=]  Config locked.... No
[=]  Key/PWD locked... No

[=] --- Tag Data ---------------------------
[=]   # | 00 01 02 03 | ascii | perm | info
[=] ----+-------------+-------+------+------
[+]   0 | D2 DF E4 94 | ....  | RO   | UID
[+]   1 | C9 28 00 AA | .(..  | RW   | Config
[+]   2 | 48 54 4F 4E | HTON  | RW   | Data
[+]   3 | 4D 49 4B 52 | MIKR  | RW   | Data
[+]   4 | FF F8 06 97 | ....  | RW   | Data
[+]   5 | 8C 66 C1 80 | .f..  | RW   | Data
[+]   6 | 03 6E F7 00 | .n..  | RW   | Data
[+]   7 | 00 00 00 00 | ....  | RW   | Data
[=] ----+-------------+-------+------+------
[=]  RO = Read Only, RW = Read Write
[=]  OTP = One Time Programmable
[=]  RO/W = Partially Read Write
[=] ----------------------------------------
